[CLSM_IMD26] This video theme is about bravery. A new student has just arrived at MMU, not knowing anyone and having no friends. He envied people who had a large group of friends, but he did not have the courage to meet friends, could not participate in any circle, was lonely and solitary. One day a certain club distributed flyers, and after thinking about it, he decided to participate in the club activities to give himself a chance to meet friends. After the activity, he found that everyone was very nice and willing to communicate with him. Since then, he has been more active in meeting friends and expanding his circle of friends.

Brandon Lee Han Yang
Goh Shii Minn
Eng Yi Jun
